auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Affinity API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in Settings -> Manage Apps -> API Keys.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Get one Affinity company by ID with optional field selectors.

items.description: One Affinity field ID.

fieldIds.description: The field IDs for which to return company field data.

items.description: One Affinity company field type selector.

fieldTypes.description: The field types for which to return company field data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Affinity company.

anyOf.description: The company's primary domain when available.

items.description: One company domain.

domains.description: The domains returned for the company.

isGlobal.description: Whether the company is global across tenants.

type.description: The field category returned by Affinity.

anyOf.description: The enrichment source when Affinity returned one.

value.description: One Affinity field value union object returned by the API.

items.description: One Affinity field value object returned by the API.

fields.description: The non-list-specific fields attached to the company when requested.

company.description: One Affinity company object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the authenticated Affinity user, tenant, and API grant summary.

inputSchema.description: No additional input is required for this action.

tenant.description: The Affinity tenant returned by whoami.

anyOf.description: The user's last name when available.

user.description: The Affinity user returned by whoami.

type.description: The authentication grant type.

items.description: One grant scope.

scopes.description: The grant scopes returned by Affinity.

grant.description: The Affinity grant returned by whoami.

actions.name: get_list
actions.description: Get one Affinity list by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Affinity list.

creatorId.description: The user ID that created the list.

ownerId.description: The user ID that owns the list.

type.description: The entity type associated with the list.

list.description: One Affinity list detail object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_opportunity
actions.description: Get one Affinity opportunity by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Affinity opportunity.

listId.description: The list ID that owns the opportunity.

opportunity.description: One Affinity opportunity object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_person
actions.description: Get one Affinity person by ID with optional field selectors.

items.description: One Affinity field ID.

fieldIds.description: The field IDs for which to return person field data.

items.description: One Affinity person field type selector.

fieldTypes.description: The field types for which to return person field data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Affinity person.

anyOf.description: The person's last name when available.
The person's primary email address when available.

items.description: One email address returned by Affinity.

type.description: The Affinity person type.
The field category returned by Affinity.

anyOf.description: The enrichment source when Affinity returned one.

value.description: One Affinity field value union object returned by the API.

items.description: One Affinity field value object returned by the API.

fields.description: The non-list-specific fields attached to the person when requested.

person.description: One Affinity person object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_saved_view
actions.description: Get one Affinity saved view by list ID and saved view ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one Affinity saved view.

type.description: The saved view type.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the saved view was created.

savedView.description: One Affinity saved view object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Affinity saved view response wrapper.
